registry_reconciliation.P2_Mexican_Mint: Present and matches registry description (Black Pot | Soil | Sensor).
registry_reconciliation.Unmonitored_Money_Plant: Present and matches registry description (White Cup | Water Propagation | No Sensors). Declared as a 'New Introduction/Intervention' between [EARLIEST] and [T-2].

new_introductions_interventions: White plastic cup containing a Money Plant cutting in water propagation, introduced between [EARLIEST] and [T-2].

inventory_reconciliation.P2: Mexican Mint (Black Pot | Soil | Sensor) - Confirmed present and visually consistent with registry type.
inventory_reconciliation.Unmonitored: Money Plant (White Cup | Water Propagation | No Sensors) - Confirmed present. This item was introduced into the biome between the [EARLIEST] and [T-2] observations.

P2_Mexican_Mint.earliest_observation: Small plant with 4 broadly ovate, light green, turgid leaves. Upright posture. Soil appears moist. Electronic sensor module present.
P2_Mexican_Mint.t_minus_2_observation: No significant change in leaf count, size, color, or turgor from [EARLIEST]. Appears stable and healthy. Soil remains moist. Electronic sensor module present.
P2_Mexican_Mint.t_minus_1_observation: Consistent with [T-2]. No visible growth, leaf loss, color shifts, or postural collapse. Soil remains moist. Electronic sensor module present.
P2_Mexican_Mint.current_observation: Consistent with [T-1]. The plant maintains its 4 primary leaves, healthy light green color, and turgid appearance. Soil remains moist. Electronic sensor module present.
P2_Mexican_Mint.overall_transformation: The P2 plant has maintained a remarkably consistent and stable appearance across all observations, showing no discernible growth, decline, leaf loss, or color changes. Its posture has remained upright and turgid.

Unmonitored_Money_Plant.t_minus_2_observation: Introduced into the biome. Consists of a single prominent, dark green, turgid leaf with a stem submerged in water within a white plastic cup. Appears healthy.
Unmonitored_Money_Plant.t_minus_1_observation: The single leaf appears consistent in size, color, and turgor with [T-2]. No signs of decline or significant growth observed.
Unmonitored_Money_Plant.current_observation: The single leaf remains consistent in size, color, and turgor with [T-1]. Appears stable and healthy in water propagation.
Unmonitored_Money_Plant.overall_transformation: Introduced between [EARLIEST] and [T-2]. Since its introduction, the Money Plant cutting has maintained a healthy, turgid appearance with no visible signs of stress, yellowing, or significant growth in its single prominent leaf.

soil_p2.earliest: Dark, somewhat clumpy, appears moist. Small white fragments (likely eggshell) present.
soil_p2.t_minus_2: Dark, appears moist. Small white fragments present. No cracking or dryness.
soil_p2.t_minus_1: Dark, appears moist. Small white fragments present. No cracking or dryness.
soil_p2.current: Dark, appears moist. Small white fragments present. No cracking or dryness.

biome_observations.incidental_growth: No weeds, moss, secondary seedlings, or uncatalogued sprouts observed in the soil of P2.
biome_anomalies: Small white fragments (consistent with eggshell pieces) are consistently present on the soil surface of P2 across all images.
An electronic sensor module with wires is consistently present near P2 in all images.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t_minus_2: Introduction of the white plastic cup containing the Money Plant cutting. Slight change in camera angle, revealing more of the black pot and the new cup.
temporal_deltas.t_minus_2_to_t_minus_1: No significant changes observed for either plant or the overall setup. The Money Plant leaf *might* show a very subtle expansion, but this is not definitively quantifiable.
temporal_deltas.t_minus_1_to_current: No discernible changes observed for either plant or the overall setup.

visual_health_inference.P2_Mexican_Mint: The plant exhibits consistent turgid, light green leaves and stable, upright posture across all observations. The soil consistently appears moist. Based on these visual cues, the P2 Mexican Mint is inferred to be in good health.
visual_health_inference.Unmonitored_Money_Plant: The plant cutting displays a single, turgid, dark green leaf that has maintained its healthy appearance in water propagation since its introduction. No signs of wilting, yellowing, or stem rot are visible. Inferred to be in good health.

anomalies.description: A white plastic cup containing a Money Plant cutting in water was introduced into the observation area between the [EARLIEST] and [T-2] images.
Small white fragments, consistent with crushed eggshells, are present on the soil surface of the P2 pot in all images.

vision_report.narrative_description: The chronological audit reveals a stable indoor plant biome. The P2 plant, identified as Mexican Mint, consistently displayed healthy, turgid, light green foliage with no signs of stress or growth fluctuations across the observation period. Its soil remained adequately moist, with persistent small white fragments (likely eggshell) on the surface. A significant intervention occurred between the earliest and T-2 observations with the introduction of a white plastic cup housing a Money Plant cutting in water. This cutting also maintained a healthy, turgid, dark green leaf throughout its observed presence. No other incidental growth or biome anomalies were detected, indicating a generally stable and well-maintained environment for both specimens.
